hooks.command: missing=""; command -v node &>/dev/null || missing="$missing Node.js"; command -v cargo &>/dev/null || missing="$missing Rust"; command -v uv &>/dev/null || missing="$missing uv"; command -v git &>/dev/null || missing="$missing Git"; if [ -n "$missing" ]; then echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"Missing prerequisites:$missing — run /install to set up\"}"; fi
